chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1317 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 13-09-2023 Mr. Irshad Hussain Dharejo, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents-university. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for respondents No.2 to 5-SALU, Khairpur submits that out of Rs. 54,65,829/- in respect of pensionery benefits/commutation, Rs. 35,00,000/- have been paid to the petitioner and the remaining amount of Rs. 19,82,914/- would be paid to him within two months. Accordingly this petition, in view of above and having served its purpose, is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
